meaning: adj.资源丰富的,足智多谋的
examples: He was amazingly inventive and resourceful, and played a major role in my career.
After discovering how resourceful she can be in tough times, Cindy is no longer easily discouraged.
Oh boy! what resourceful children I have.
The firm described Mr Stimson as an "energetic, resourceful, passionate person with a hands-on approach".
He takes Elvira back, and everyone sings the praises of Isabella, the resourceful woman from Italy.
